title: this should be avoided in functional components
description:
"this" should not be used in functional componentsAnalyze your codeintentionality-logicalmaintainabilityreliabilityBugreactWhy is this an issue?More InfoReferring tothisin React functional components would be an error because the components are just regular JavaScript functions and do not have an object associated with them. Functional components receive their props as a first argument to the component function, so you can access them directly, and it is a common practice to destructure them right away.function UserProfile({firstName, lastName}){ return (
{firstName} {lastName}
); }React also supports legacy class-based components, wherethiskeyword refers to the component instance object, but this style of writing components is no longer recommended, and mixing
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.
